parameters.query:
SELECT
  mm.id AS meeting_id,
  mm.manager_name,
  mm.meeting_datetime,
  mm.week_reference
FROM manager_meetings mm
LEFT JOIN pre_meeting_email_log pel
  ON pel.meeting_id = mm.id
WHERE pel.id IS NULL
  AND mm.meeting_datetime BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
                        AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT
  property_name,
  vacant_units,
  ready_vacants,
  not_ready_vacants,
  delinquent_count,
  delinquent_amount,
  turns_in_progress,
  work_orders_over_7_days
FROM manager_weekly_reports
WHERE manager_name = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2
ORDER BY property_name;

SELECT
  action_description,
  action_owner,
  due_date,
  status,
  property_name
FROM manager_meeting_actions
WHERE meeting_id = $1
ORDER BY due_date ASC, created_at ASC;

SELECT
  holiday_date,
  holiday_name,
  calendar_type
FROM operational_holidays
WHERE holiday_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(DATE($1), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
                      AND DATE_ADD(DATE($1), INTERVAL 45 DAY)
ORDER BY holiday_date;

SELECT
  mm.id AS meeting_id,
  mm.manager_name,
  mm.meeting_datetime,
  mm.week_reference
FROM manager_meetings mm
LEFT JOIN pre_meeting_email_log pel
  ON pel.meeting_id = mm.id
WHERE pel.id IS NULL
  AND mm.meeting_datetime BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
                        AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT
  property_name,
  vacant_units,
  ready_vacants,
  not_ready_vacants,
  delinquent_count,
  delinquent_amount,
  turns_in_progress,
  work_orders_over_7_days
FROM manager_weekly_reports
WHERE manager_name = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2
ORDER BY property_name;

SELECT
  action_description,
  action_owner,
  due_date,
  status,
  property_name
FROM manager_meeting_actions
WHERE meeting_id = $1
ORDER BY due_date ASC, created_at ASC;

SELECT
  holiday_date,
  holiday_name,
  calendar_type
FROM operational_holidays
WHERE holiday_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(DATE($1), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
                      AND DATE_ADD(DATE($1), INTERVAL 45 DAY)
ORDER BY holiday_date;
